chapter_title.en: The Virtue of Mosques, Their Sanctity and the Reward for Those Who Pray in Them

text: 688 - وَ أَمَّا مَسْجِدُ اَلْخَيْفِ بِمِنًى فَإِنَّهُ رَوَى جَابِرٌ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ - «صَلَّى فِي مَسْجِدِ اَلْخَيْفِ سَبْعُمِائَةِ نَبِيٍّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.688 - As for the Mosque of Al-Khayf in Mina, it has been narrated by Jabir from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that He said:
"Seven hundred prophets prayed in the Mosque of al-Khayf."
